summary_en: Kobayashi Yoko completed acquisition of 47,600 shares (¥25.7M) via ToSTNeT-3 on May 18, 2026, under a board-authorized ¥200M / 350,000-share buyback program.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results of Treasury Shares via Off-Hours Matching Transactions (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On May 18, 2026, Kobayashi Yoko Co., Ltd. (TSE Standard, code 8742) completed an acquisition of 47,600 treasury shares at a total cost of ¥25,704,000 via ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours matching transaction) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. This acquisition was conducted pursuant to a board resolution from March 26, 2026, which authorized a share buyback program with an upper limit of 350,000 shares (2.93% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) and a maximum expenditure of ¥200,000,000 over the period April 1 to September 30, 2026. As of the acquisition date, the company has cumulatively acquired 187,400 shares for ¥99,190,700 under this authorization. The company intends to continue repurchasing shares up to the authorized limits using both regular market trading and additional ToSTNeT-3 transactions.
